mapper.select: SELECT ld.id, ld.user_id AS userId, ld.category_id AS categoryId, ld.item_name AS itemName, ld.study_time AS studyTime, ld.study_date AS studyDate, ld.created_at AS createdAt, ld.update_at AS updateAt, c.name AS categoryName FROM learning_data ld JOIN categories c ON ld.category_id = c.id WHERE ld.user_id = #{userId} AND ld.study_date >= #{startDate} AND ld.study_date < #{endDate} ORDER BY ld.category_id ASC, ld.id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_data ( user_id, category_id, item_name, study_time, study_date ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{categoryId}, #{itemName}, #{studyTime}, #{studyDate} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, category_id AS categoryId, item_name AS itemName, study_time AS studyTime, study_date AS studyDate, created_at AS createdAt, update_at AS updateAt FROM learning_data WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT ld.study_date AS study_date, c.name AS category_name, SUM(ld.study_time) AS total_study_time FROM learning_data ld JOIN categories c ON ld.category_id = c.id WHERE ld.user_id = #{userId} AND ld.study_date >= #{startDate} AND ld.study_date < #{endDate} GROUP BY ld.study_date, c.id, c.name ORDER BY ld.study_date ASC, c.id ASC
